title: Robinhood stock spikes after reported deal interest from FTX
text: Shares of Robinhood Markets Inc. HOOD, +14.69% were surging about 15% in afternoon trading Monday after a Bloomberg News report said that FTX, the cryptocurrency exchange run by Sam Bankman-Fried, was exploring whether it may be able to purchase Robinhood.
